posts.author: Stephanie (ENERGIE SOLIDAIRE)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hell

I have 2 boards : 1/Client - 2/ Commande

I have a item, in the board 1 -When the statut of the item, is won => Move item in the board 2- it’s ok

But i want also, duplication the item board 1, and move this item in a other group in the board 1

But, its doesn’t work

Could you tell me the recipe because, i tried all the automatisations, et one time, it’s work, a other time, it doesn’t work and i don’tknow how make this recipe

Thanks
